raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration and intention-setting",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a prior state of coping/survival exists and can be transcended",
    "choices possess inherent nourishing or non-nourishing qualities",
    "expansion and thriving are metaphysically available states distinct from survival",
    "vitality can be normalized through alignment and choice"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a non-dual or consciousness-first ontology; binary contrasts (thriving/coping, expansion/survival) are rhetorically coherent but presuppose a directional ontology of consciousness",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker's belief in the statements produces measurable behavioral shifts toward self-care and reduced reactivity, or the underlying metaphysical premise (consciousness shapes experienced reality) holds",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements function as bypass, obscuring material constraints, trauma, or external conditions that require practical intervention rather than re-alignment"
}
